title: Login Issues – Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log into their account. They have tried resetting the password multiple times but still receive an authentication error.

title: Payment Failed – Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending in 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button appears inactive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows a different city even after updating the profile. The system still displays the old address.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile application crashes immediately after opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the refunded amount in their bank account.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving the 2FA verification code on their registered phone number during login.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile image but the system shows an 'Upload Failed' message each time.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Problem
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription plan but the toggle option is currently disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order successfully but did not receive the confirmation email after payment.

title: Search Results Not Showing
description: Customer reports that searching for products returns empty results even though the items exist in the catalog.

title: UI Alignment Issue in Safari
description: Buttons and text fields overlap on the checkout page when using Safari browser on macOS.

title: OTP Verification Delay
description: Customer reports that the OTP code arrives after 60–90 seconds which prevents successful login.

title: Automatic Renewal Payment Failure
description: Customer’s subscription renewal failed even though the saved payment method is valid.

title: Security Warning on Older Browsers
description: Customers using older browsers receive an SSL security warning when accessing the website.
